project.name: Hero: When Streetwear Meets Kava: Pink Gorilla's Miami Experiment

data.label: Style
data.name: w33s3 Dark + Chill Illustration
data.description: Warm illustration style with hand-drawn quality. Soft ink lines, gentle shading, cozy graphic novel aesthetic. Warm amber and earth tone palette with deep shadows. Pacific island meets urban lounge atmosphere. Stylized illustration, NOT photorealistic. No photographs. Painterly warmth with visible artistic strokes. No text, watermarks, or white borders. Edge-to-edge composition.

data.label: Setting
data.description: Intimate kava bar interior with low lighting, wooden bowls, tropical plants, comfortable seating areas

data.label: Action
data.content: Sleek hybrid venue interior at golden hour - modern coffee bar counter with espresso machines on one side, kava shell service on the other, streetwear clothing racks visible in background, 66-seat space with indoor-outdoor flow to terrace, Miami downtown visible through floor-to-ceiling windows, neon pink accents, late afternoon light streaming in, warm wood textures mixed with industrial metal, patrons working on laptops and socializing, fashion retail meets hospitality aesthetic

data.label: Negative
data.content: photorealistic, photograph, photo, realistic, alcohol, beer, cocktails, drunk people, party atmosphere, bright lights, nightclub, loud, text, watermarks
